prompt: Give me a 5-bullet overview of the projects currently indexed in my hybrid-search memory. If you cannot tell, say so briefly.
Where is authentication or login handled across my indexed code? Point me at specific files.
List up to 5 TODO or FIXME items you can find in my indexed projects, with the file each lives in.
In 3 sentences, explain reciprocal rank fusion and when it is useful.
What chunk_size does my hybrid-search project use? Look in config.yaml if you have a tool for it.
Which MCP tools do you have available right now? List their names and a one-line description.
Name three React components you can find in my indexed code and describe each one in a single sentence.
Write a 3-line summary of hybrid search (BM25 + vector). No retrieval needed.
